description_long: This object is a rectangular, upholstered storage unit with a soft, fabric-covered exterior. The top surface is slightly padded and features subtle tufting, suggesting a cushioned lid. The sides are straight and the corners are gently rounded, giving it a modern, minimalistic appearance. The fabric appears to be a textured material, possibly linen or a synthetic blend, and the overall color is a muted gray. There are no visible handles, drawers, or label holders, and the object lacks any obvious locking mechanism. Its design suggests it is intended for use as a storage ottoman or bench, rather than a traditional metal filing cabinet.
description: A rectangular, fabric-upholstered storage unit with a padded, tufted lid and soft gray exterior. It has a modern, minimalistic look with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_0: The end view shows the narrow side of the storage unit, highlighting the padded lid and straight, fabric-covered sides.
description_view_1: The long side view displays the full length of the object, emphasizing the tufted top and the seamless, textured fabric exterior.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, showing the narrow side and the soft, rounded edges of the lid.
description_view_3: The other long side view reveals the same features as view 1, with the fabric texture and subtle tufting on the lid visible.
